message:
fix(btree): correct cursor seek-past-end behavior for insert operations

When a seek lands past the last key on a leaf, the cursor now sets
at_eof = true and preserves the stack context instead of advancing.
advance_prev() now recovers from EOF state. index_insert() and
table_insert() use cell_count as the insert position when at EOF.

This fixes insert-after-seek-past-end correctness where the cursor
would lose its position and insert at the wrong location. New tests
validate the fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
